compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect Figma design collaboration (Push)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant documentation to reflect the new Figma design collaboration workflow, config keys, tag lifecycle, and approval command.
**Why**: Ensures future agents and developers have accurate awareness of the design collaboration capability.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (architecture section for design collaboration, quick reference for approval command, config key reference for design.figma_collaboration and design.figma_staleness_days), tag lifecycle documentation (design:awaiting_import → design:approved)
- OUT: Creating new documentation files — updates only

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the design collaboration workflow (SVG export → Figma import → PNG export → approval → dual-source implementation)
  ← Satisfies: documentation accuracy
- When this story is complete, the approval command is listed in CLAUDE.md's quick reference table
  ← Satisfies: command discoverability
- When this story is complete, design.figma_collaboration and design.figma_staleness_days config keys are documented in the config reference
  ← Satisfies: configuration documentation

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
